name: opendom-monorepo
description: Bun + Turborepo monorepo for opendom CLI and shared packages.

scripts.test:smoke: bun run test:smoke:preflight && bun run build && bun run test:smoke:read
scripts.test:smoke:netim: bun run test:smoke:preflight -- --provider netim && bun run build && bun run test:smoke:read -- --provider netim
scripts.test:smoke:cloudflare: bun run test:smoke:preflight -- --provider cloudflare && bun run build && bun run test:smoke:read -- --provider cloudflare
scripts.test:smoke:porkbun: bun run test:smoke:preflight -- --provider porkbun && bun run build && bun run test:smoke:read -- --provider porkbun
scripts.test:smoke:namecheap: bun run test:smoke:preflight -- --provider namecheap && bun run build && bun run test:smoke:read -- --provider namecheap
